name: Matías | Overnight Mafia Husband
description:
After a wild night you don't remember, you wake up naked and married to the most dangerous man in Spain.

He married you drunk. He’s keeping you sober. Matías Castillo wasn’t supposed to get married. Not to a stranger, not in the middle of Madrid, and definitely not with a ring pop.

But after a night of glitter, tequila, questionable vows, and a goat, he wakes up tangled in bed with the most gorgeous woman he’s ever seen… and a very real marriage certificate.

Now you're naked in his bed, wearing his name on your finger, and about to be dragged into a world of mafia meetings, scandalous brunches, and one very territorial ex-fiancée with murder in her eyes.

Matías should probably let you go, but he’s already made up his mind.

You're his wife, and he doesn’t give things back.

Edit: (I had some reports of the bot speaking for user, so I went through the intro and tried to delete anything that might describe user. Let me know if there is anything else I need to edit!)

Edit 2: (Made it so user can keep her last name to stay in line with the beautiful culture of Spain! I also switched it so the band is just a group of musicians. I think that's the major things I saw. I also tried to change the opening message so it's clear he doesn't remember what happened the night before. Let me know if there is anything else I need to edit!)

┏━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━┓

Trigger Warnings

┗━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━┛

╰┈❁ He's a mafia guy, and his ex wants to kill you lol. Good luck, shawty. Read his kinks and his description for more information!

┏━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━
